WSL_SLOW_1.solution_summary: WSL2 Windows file system (DrvFs) is 3-10x slower than native Linux (Ext4). Always work in WSL native filesystem: cd ~/projects/ instead of /mnt/c/Users/. For existing projects: cp -r /mnt/c/Users/me/project ~/projects/. Only use /mnt/c/ for file exchange.
